scripts_test_convention.evidence: Design includes script inventory, script test stub matrix, and the standards exception note for scripts/test/.

automated_checks.name: check_design_evidence.sh
automated_checks.details: All required OpenClaw design evidence checks pass after the post-review fixes.

automated_checks.name: path_portability_spot_check
automated_checks.details: No hardcoded user-home skill paths remain in the design artifact.

findings.summary: The design removes all auxiliary workspace-local qa-plan-* packages, which is broader than the explicitly typed subset but consistent with the wildcard request.
findings.evidence: The design delete list includes qa-plan-confluence-review in addition to the explicitly typed package names.
findings.recommended_fix: Confirm no live consumers remain before deleting qa-plan-confluence-review during implementation.

findings.summary: Legacy projects/feature-plan migration is correctly designed but requires careful implementation to preserve archive and freshness metadata.
findings.evidence: Phase 0 requires migration-aware handling of legacy runs.
findings.recommended_fix: Back migration behavior with regression coverage for archive contents and timestamp preservation.
